stories.headline: US launches self-defense strikes on Iranian targets amid escalating conflict

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: IRAN WILL NEVER HAVE A NUCLEAR WEAPON!!!

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: The US started a war of aggression against Iran. Tehran retaliated in self-defense. But now the US is bombing Iran again, and claiming to act in "self-defense", after it started the war in the first place! Aggressors cannot act in self-defense, by definition.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: BREAKING: U.S. forces on Monday launched what U.S. Central Command described as "self-defense strikes" in southern Iran.

stories.headline: Partial restoration of internet in Iran after 88-day nationwide blackout

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: 📈 Confirmed: Live metrics show a partial restoration to internet connectivity in #Iran on day 88, after 2093 hours of near-total isolation from international networks, the longest nationwide internet shutdown in modern history. It is unclear if the restoration will be sustained.

perspectives.body: Middle East Eye: Afrika ülkeleri, Türkiye'nin Somali ile kurduğu askeri ve ekonomi iş birliklerine benzer şekilde, Türkiye ile anlaşmalar yapmak istiyor. Türkiye, Afrika ülkelerinden gelen talepleri değerlendiriyor.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: Middle East Eye: ➖"Afrika ülkeleri, Türkiye ile “Somali modeli” üzerinden güvenlik ilişkileri kurmak istiyor Ankara, Türkiye ile daha yakın güvenlik ve ekonomik ilişkiler geliştirmek isteyen Afrika ülkelerinden gelen talepleri değerlendiriyor."

stories.headline: Evacuation zone shrinks around failing chemical tank in Southern California
stories.body:
The evacuation zone around a failing chemical tank in Southern California is shrinking after officials said the "worst-case scenario" of a catastrophic explosion has been averted.

ABC News’ Trevor Ault has the latest. 

Read more at the link in bio. https://abcnews.com/US/chemical-tank-southern-california-longer-threat-explosion-officials/story?utm_source=twitter&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=dhtwitter&utm_content=app.dashsocial.com/abcnews/library/media/677194743&id=133286870

stories.headline: Owner of pro-Trump house in Escondido dies after assault
stories.body:
Owner of iconic pro-Trump 'Trump House' in southern California dead after a stranger allegedly punched him in the jaw, then struck him repeatedly in the head outside his own property.

Kerry Sheron, 69, a U.S. Army veteran, spent years decorating his Escondido home with American flags and Trump memorabilia — and spent years enduring complaints and vandalism because of it.

The suspect, 32-year-old Thomas Caleb Butler, faces attempted murder charges. The DA's office now reviews whether to upgrade them.

Credit: Kerry Sheron via Facebook
